name: Hungarian Goulash Soup (Gulyasleves)
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Beef shank or chuck, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté the minced onions in fat until golden brown.
2. Add the beef cubes and stir until well browned.
3. Stir in salt, paprika, and sliced tomatoes. Simmer for 30 minutes, adding water as needed to prevent over-browning.
4. Sprinkle flour over the meat mixture. Stir to combine, then add enough water to cover the meat completely. Include diced parsnip, carrot, and green pepper. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to low and simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
6. Add cubed potatoes and more water to reach the desired soup consistency. Season with salt to taste. Continue simmering until the potatoes and beef are fully cooked.
7. For pinched noodles:
- Mix flour into the ingredients in a bowl to form a medium dough.
- Drop tiny noodle pieces from a spoon into the simmering soup using a flat, edged knife if needed.
8. Add the pinched noodles to the pot and boil for a few more minutes with chopped parsley. Avoid adding too many noodles as they serve only to enhance flavor and texture.
Serve in a deep bowl.
